song.title: Around Thy Table
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Around Thy table, holy Lord, In fellowship we meet, Obedient to Thy gracious word This feast of love to eat.
[V2] 2) Here every one That loves Thy name, Our willing hearts embrace; Our source of life and hope the same, All debtors to Thy grace.
[V3] 3) Commune with each at this blest hour, Thy peace, Thy joy impart; Thy thoughts of love, of truth, of pow’r, Impress upon each heart.
song.author: Alferd P. Gibbs
